params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 4-bit shift register that shifts bits to the right on every clock cycle, with the ability to load a new value when the load signal is low. The register has a synchronous reset that sets the register to all ones. The inputs are clk, load, reset, and a 4-bit data input. The output is a 4-bit q which represents the current value of the shift register.
